# MOGHARE360 V1 — Owner Presentation Lock

## Owner Demo Flow (recommended order)

1. Product Home — `erp-product-home.php`
2. Soft Run Control Center — `erp-soft-run-control-center.php`
3. Demo Flow Map — `erp-demo-flow-map.php`
4. End-to-End Demo Scenario — `erp-end-to-end-demo-scenario.php`
5. Management Dashboard — `erp-management-dashboard.php`
6. Bottleneck Monitor — `erp-bottleneck-monitor.php`
7. Financial Control Summary — `erp-financial-control-summary.php`
8. JobCard Timeline — `erp-jobcard-timeline.php`
9. Final Invoice / Delivery — `erp-final-invoice-board.php`
10. RC Release Readiness — `erp-release-readiness.php`

## What to Show

- Full operational path P1–P7 with gates intact
- Management KPI and bottleneck visibility (P8)
- Soft run and E2E demo tracking (P9)
- Navigation registry and release readiness (P10)
- RC final audit and package controls (P11)

## What NOT to Promise

- Official accounting / voucher posting
- General ledger
- Payment gateway
- Bank integration
- Official tax / Moadian integration
- SaaS / multi-company / tenant model
- Full HR / CRM / marketing
- Full purchase / warehouse write scope
- Production deployment from this RC

## V1 Boundaries

MOGHARE360 V1 is an operational workflow RC for automotive service: intake through delivery, with management visibility and demo packaging. Financial views are operational control summaries, not accounting system replacement.

## Signoff Checklist

- [ ] Workflow P1–P7 demonstrated
- [ ] Management KPI shown
- [ ] V1 limitations explained
- [ ] No false promise on accounting/gateway/tax/SaaS
- [ ] DEMO data only (M360-DEMO prefix)
- [ ] Security scope lock reviewed
- [ ] RC final lock acknowledged
